message:
Fix clippy warnings and pipeline Default implementation

- Add clippy allow attributes for significant_drop_tightening in circuit_breaker
- Refactor sliding window check in record_success
- Implement proper Default for PipelineConfig (check_cancellation: true)
- Fix type inference in pipeline3_all_ok test
